Appearances:
Michael E. Hale, Esq., of Liuzzi Murphy Solomon, Tel. 415.400.7000, moving party and counsel for plaintiff.

The matter was discussed. The parties were ordered to meet and confer. After an in camera hearing, ATTY. MICHAEL HALE'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF CHANCE ROBINSON, A MINOR, BY AND THROUGH HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM, MAIISA ROBINSON is continued to May 22, 2012 at 9:30am in Department 302.
